response:
Based on the provided context, the **Reichstadt Agreement** was made in July 1876 between Austria-Hungary and Russia, who were at that time in an alliance with Germany known as the **League of the Three Emperors** (also called the "Dreikaiserbund").

The text explicitly states that Chancellor **Otto von Bismarck** formed this league in 1873 and took charge of German foreign policy during its existence (1873–1887). Therefore, both Bismarck and the Reichstadt Agreement were part of the **League of the Three Emperors**.
